sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 79

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 79:1
items.html:
(to the question) Souls of male men
The souls formed from the Gevurot that come with the MAD from ZA are souls of male men. (Item 42)
